vocab.meaning: tình cờ phát hiện ra (cảnh đẹp)
vocab.example: I love wandering off the beaten track because you often stumble upon breathtaking vistas that aren't on any map.

vocab.meaning: đắm mình vào, thưởng ngoạn một cách chậm rãi
vocab.example: Before I even take my camera out, I like to just stand there and soak in the panoramic view for a few minutes.

vocab.meaning: loại bỏ (ánh sáng chói, chi tiết rác) bằng kính lọc
vocab.example: I usually use a polarizing lens to filter out the glare from the water's surface when photographing the coastline.

vocab.meaning: làm nổi bật lên (màu sắc, chi tiết)
vocab.example: The post-processing phase is crucial because it helps to bring out the subtle golden hues of the sunset.

vocab.meaning: cắt bỏ (những phần không mong muốn trong ảnh)
vocab.example: If there are any unsightly power lines in the frame, I usually just crop them out later to keep the landscape looking pristine.
I always set my alarm for 5 AM because I don't want to miss out on the soft, ethereal light of dawn.

vocab.meaning: thử nghiệm/nghịch các cài đặt khác nhau
vocab.example: When I'm at a waterfall, I like to play around with slow shutter speeds to create that silky water effect.

vocab.meaning: chỉnh sửa, làm cho đẹp hơn (hậu kỳ)
vocab.example: A few minor adjustments to the contrast and saturation can really spruce up a landscape photo and make it pop.

vocab.meaning: nổi bật, gây ấn tượng mạnh
vocab.example: That solitary tree against the vast snow-covered field really made the composition stand out.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp (xu hướng/công nghệ nhiếp ảnh)
vocab.example: I try to keep up with the latest drone technology to capture scenery from unique aerial perspectives.
